slides.title: Single Agent Architecture
slides.code:
graph TD
  A[User Input] --> B[LLM]
  B --> C{Need Tool?}
  C -->|Yes| D[Tool Execution]
  D --> E[Tool Result]
  E --> B
  C -->|No| F[Generate Response]
  F --> G[User Output]
  B --> H[(Memory Store)]

slides.title: Multi-Agent Workflow
slides.code:
graph LR
  A[User Request] --> B[Router Agent]
  B --> C[Research Agent]
  B --> D[Writer Agent]
  B --> E[Code Agent]
  C --> F[Aggregator]
  D --> F
  E --> F
  F --> G[Review Agent]
  G --> H[Final Output]

slides.title: Key Takeaways
bullets: Framework choice depends on use case

slides.quote: An AI agent is not just a model that generates text — it's a system that can reason, plan, and act in the world.
